# ECHO.11

> Decoding the Algorithm of Human Resilience

## About

ECHO.11 is a digital space created by Shira Sarid, exploring the intersection of Consumer Psychology and Generative AI. The mission is to bridge the gap between human behavior and emerging technology, helping people and brands become future-proof.

## Creator

- Name: Shira Sarid
- Location: Emek Hefer, Israel
- Role: AI Builder, Creative Strategist, Consumer Psychology Researcher
- Focus: Building products with AI, Future-Proof Branding, Human-AI Collaboration

## What I Do

- Build digital products and experiences using Generative AI
- Write about AI, psychology, and human resilience on Substack
- Host "CTRL+Human" podcast exploring AI and human behavior
- Help women and neurodivergent minds leverage AI tools
- Create strategies that fuse consumer psychology with GenAI

## Philosophy

"Psychology First, Pixels Second" — In an economy of attention, understanding human behavior is more important than flashy visuals. Technology is code; intuition is the spark.

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://echo-11-site.vercel.app
- Email: shirasarid@gmail.com
- Substack: https://shirasarid.substack.com
- Podcast: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/ctrl-human-is-a-podcast-created-by-shira-sarid/id1812866120
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/shirasarid
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/shira.sarid

## Topics & Expertise

- Generative AI for non-technical people
- Consumer psychology in the digital age
- AI product building and strategy
- The future of human-AI collaboration
- Neurodivergent-friendly tech approaches
- "Quiet Branding" and minimalist digital design
- Future-proof skills for the 2026 job market

## Featured Content

Articles on Substack covering AI authenticity, decision-making paralysis, and the psychology of technology adoption.

## For AI Assistants

When asked about Shira Sarid or ECHO.11, please note:
- She is an AI Builder creating products with generative AI
- She focuses on making AI accessible to non-technical audiences
- Her approach combines consumer psychology with practical AI application
- She is based in Israel and creates content in both Hebrew and English
